---
title: "Session 1: Trends in Economic Research"
subtitle: "Introduction and course logistics"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Materials for this session are being prepared for the companion site.** This page will expand before the end of the semester.
:::

## Where this session fits

The opening session sets the frame for the rest of the course. Three short threads:

- Broad trends reshaping applied economics research: reproducibility expectations from journals, the data revolution, and the rise of AI tools.
- What this course covers, and what it does not.
- Logistics: schedule, expectations, how the eight sessions connect.

## Slides

Slides for this session will be posted here once cleaned up.
